title: Sounding Seams
date: This EP features 4 songs, all of which will be released on Bandcamp as singles over the month of May, with the full EP coming out on Thursday 6th June.
bodyHtml:
This EP features 4 songs, all of which will be released on Bandcamp as singles over the month of May, with the full EP coming out on Thursday 6th June.

See our bandcamp page for updates!
